title: Research Workflows in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger research workflows in practice judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Research Workflows in Practice is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Research Workflows in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good research workflows in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Research Workflows in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
